top_5_fixes: Make validator-config the strict single source of truth by removing duplicated rounding/status-mapping policy text from assumptions.
Extend SourceTag coverage beyond competitor proofs to scorecard evidence and key KPI claims for uniform audit traceability.
Normalize SourceTag taxonomy (e.g., CustomerAttestation/InternalAudit/ThirdPartyBenchmark) with a controlled enum and ID format checks.
Add automated validator checks that enforce SourceTag presence on all externally-facing proof/evidence fields, not only competitor_matrix proofs.
Add a reproducibility artifact (evaluation manifest) that records candidate hash, schema hash, config hash, and validator version per run.
